stories.headline: Albanian government halts Kushner-Ivanka resort project amid mass protests

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: Protests in Albania continue. Even Albainian Americans are protesting here. Remember when the media all wanted you to know & hear about Iran protests, which were mostly astro turf & virtually no videos of Iran? Now they ignore Albania. Why?

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: 🇦🇱 | After 6 days of furious protests that changed nothing, violent armed clashes have now erupted in northern Albania. Enraged Albanians are rising up against the ultimate betrayal: their only island - the strategic military outpost of Sazan - is being sold to Jared Kushner.

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: BREAKING: HELL YES! The European Union strikes a CRUSHING blow against Jared Kushner's corrupt resort development by warning Albania that it could endanger their efforts to join the EU. This scandal just shot through the stratosphere...

stories.headline: Russian forces withdraw from Kinburn Spit due to Ukrainian drone strikes

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: Russian forces according to reports are being forced to withdraw on mass from positions around the Kinburn Spit south of the Dnipro river due to severe supply difficulties caused by continued Ukrainian drone strike campaigns on Southern logistical routes.

stories.headline: Trump admin plans largest-ever denaturalization of 17 US citizens for immigration fraud

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body:
🚨 BREAKING: The Trump DOJ is set to announce the LARGEST-EVER program to DENATURALIZE US citizens accused of immigration fraud — CBS

LET'S GO! Please work Ilhan Omar in there! 🔥

These denaturalization powers were RARELY ever used so aggressively in these cases

JD Vance and AG Todd Blanche are going all-out in sending foreign pirates back to their home countries! 🇺🇸

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: EXCLUSIVE: The Trump administration plans to announce it is seeking to revoke the citizenship of 17 U.S. citizens accused of immigration fraud, expanding its unprecedented denaturalization campaign, CBS News has exclusively learned.

stories.headline: California election results delayed amid fraud claims after Spencer Pratt loss

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body:
🚨 BREAKING: President Trump says it was NOT POSSIBLE for Spencer Pratt to be defeated by Nithya Raman "after the big lead he had"

"3rd World Nation. Rigged Elections! Now they’ll be working on great guy Steve Hilton. Won’t have results for, possibly, TWO WEEKS, according to officials." 🤯

California Democrats legalized election fraud!

It's a worldwide embarrassment.

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: Trump should show up here at the L.A. County ballot processing center because he’d learn within five minutes this is democracy in action, not some conspiracy.

Pass the SAVE America Act NOW

https://thehill.com/homenews/senate/5914534-save-america-act-fails-senate-vote/

stories.body: JUST IN: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang says AI stocks are "very cheap" right now.

stories.headline: ¥2 trillion erased from Chinese stock market amid crash.
stories.body:
¥2,000,000,000,000 erased from Chinese stock market today.

"Everything Crash" has started.

stories.headline: ¥48.3 trillion ($335B) wiped from Japan's stock market.
stories.body: BREAKING: Over ¥48,300,000,000,000 ($335 BILLION) wiped out from Japan's stock market as the NIKKEI plunges 4.2%.

stories.headline: Runtime for Spider-Man: Brand New Day reportedly 2 hours 30 minutes.
stories.body:
The runtime for ‘SPIDER-MAN: BRAND NEW DAY’ is reportedly 2 hours and 30 minutes.

This would make it the longest Spider-Man film ever.

stories.headline: Narendra Modi attends Defence Investiture Ceremony 2026.
stories.body: Attended the Defence Investiture Ceremony 2026 (Phase-1) where Gallantry Awards were conferred upon our brave personnel. We are proud of their extraordinary courage, commitment and selfless service to the nation.

stories.headline: NASA to announce Artemis III astronauts tomorrow.
stories.body:
Tomorrow, we're announcing the astronauts flying aboard Artemis III, the mission that will test rendezvous and docking capabilities with commercial lunar landers in low Earth orbit.

If you could ask the Artemis III astronauts any question, what would you ask them?

stories.headline: Trump formally nominates Todd Blanche as attorney general
stories.body: Breaking News: President Trump formally nominated Todd Blanche as attorney general, setting up a confirmation fight.

stories.headline: North Korea's unlikely economic growth story with smartphones, EVs and pizza
stories.body: Smartphones, EVs and brick-oven pizza. North Korea is the world’s most unlikely economic growth story.

stories.headline: Nippon Steel plans $2-2.5 billion investment at Mon Valley Works
stories.body: Exclusive: Nippon Steel, which bought U.S. Steel last year, said it expects to spend $2 billion to $2.5 billion at Mon Valley Works over the next three years to replace the equipment that rolls steel

stories.headline: Texas Tech QB Brendan Sorsby granted injunction for 2026 eligibility
stories.body:
Breaking: A judge in district court in Lubbock County, Texas, has granted the injunction requested by Texas Tech QB Brendan Sorsby. He’s set to be eligible for the 2026 season.

Sorsby cannot play in Texas Tech's first two games, which was the penalty his legal team suggested to the NCAA.

stories.headline: Sam Presti comments on SGA facing social media pressure
stories.body:
“He’s playing against 6 people. He’s got 5 defenders and the 6th defender is social media.”

- Sam Presti on SGA

(Via @CAlmanza1007 )

stories.body: .@fernandomendoza did his best trying to paint the @Raiders logo 🧑‍🎨

stories.headline: Elon Musk shares trivia about the name origin of the Straits of Hormuz.
stories.body: Straits of Hormuz are named after Ahura Mazda from Zoroastrianism

stories.headline: Luca Guadagnino calls Top Gun: Maverick a 'very bad movie'
stories.body:
Luca Guadagnino says ‘TOP GUN: MAVERICK’ is a “very bad movie.”

He says people liked it “because the economy of nostalgia right seems to be the only commodity that can be dominated by all types of markets.”

stories.headline: Kanye West turns 49
stories.body: Kanye West turned 49.

stories.headline: Frozen chicken chashu recipe using a pot without thawing
stories.body:
冷凍ガチガチのお肉を解凍せずそのまま使える鶏チャーシュー(鍋版)です！！

お鍋に砂糖、醤油、チューブにんにく、水、凍ったままの鶏肉をゴンと入れて火にかけるだけ！

お肉もめっちゃ柔らかく、できてすぐ食べても味が染みてて最高です！個人的にはレンジの方がラクやけど、相性が合わない方はぜひ

stories.headline: Anthropic publishes science blog on why AI has advanced faster in coding than in biology.
stories.body:
New Science Blog: Why has AI advanced faster in coding than in biology? 

To agents, bio databases are like cities built before cars—maddening to drive in because they're designed for different traffic. 

How do we build infrastructure agents can use?
https://www.anthropic.com/research/agents-in-biology

stories.headline: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang calls global tech stocks selloff a buying opportunity as AI buildout begins.
stories.body: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang calls the global tech stocks selloff that began last week a buying opportunity, saying the buildout of AI has just begun https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-06-08/nvidia-ceo-shrugs-off-tech-stock-rout-with-ai-just-beginning?taid=6a2632cf95609a00012e47df&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_content=business&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter

stories.headline: Tardigrades can survive the vacuum of space and extreme conditions by entering a dormant state.
stories.body:
This tiny creature can survive the vacuum of space

Tardigrades can survive extreme cold, intense radiation, the vacuum of space and years without water by entering a nearly indestructible dormant state

stories.headline: Voter fraud allegations involving homeless in Los Angeles and Southern California
stories.body:
🚨 HOLY CRAP! It's been revealed that TENS OF THOUSANDS of homeless people in Los Angeles might be responsible for the last-minute Nithya Raman surge over Spencer Pratt

Recently, voter fraud was BUSTED on Skid Row

I bet many of them are ILLEGAL ALIENS and non-citizens!

Many of these people don't have IDs and can't prove who they are.

But leftist activists are deployed to the streets to harvest their "information" so they can get mail-in ballots.

FOX NEWS: "First Assistant U.S. attorney in LA, Bill Essayli, says California has refused to give the federal government its voter rolls and allows first-time voters to use IDs like gym and debit cards."

"Essayli also writes, California allows third parties to collect and turn in ballots on voters' behalf, a practice known as ballot harvesting, with few restrictions."

"This makes it difficult to track who actually received, completed, and submitted each ballot."

"Now, Essayli says there are ongoing voter fraud investigations here in Southern California. He points to a recent woman who was arrested for allegedly paying people on Skid Row to register to vote." — @MattFinnFNC

stories.headline: Video of illegal border crossing into Southern California near San Diego
stories.body:
Illegals are seen using a ladder to illegal enter America from Tijuana into San Diego

This location is at Border Field State Park. The border wall stretches about 300 feet into the ocean to stop illegals from entering America

As you can see, California does nothing to stop them and actually this has been encouraged for decades. Anyone in Southern California knows illegals pour into America at this location

There were lots of videos of this happening during the Biden Admin too

More illegal Democrats voters headed into California to sign up for benefits

stories.headline: Observation on anger as universal fun with video
stories.body: It is fascinating that provoking anger is a universal form of fun
